allow_comments.title: Allow Comments
allow_comments.description: When disabled, comment forms are hidden and new comments are rejected.

require_login.title: Require Login
require_login.description: Only authenticated users may post comments.

allow_anonymous.title: Allow Anonymous Comments
allow_anonymous.description: When login is not required, allow guest name/email comments.

auto_approve.title: Auto-Approve Comments
auto_approve.description: Publish new comments immediately without moderation.

show_title.title: Show Item Title
show_title.description: Display the item title in the page header on item views.

show_author.title: Show Author
show_author.description: Display the author name on item pages.

show_published_date.title: Show Published Date
show_published_date.description: Display the publish date on item pages.

show_author_bio.title: Show Author Bio
show_author_bio.description: Display author profile information when available.

show_comments.title: Show Comments
show_comments.description: Display the comments section on item pages.
